productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Warnick Square Block Navy Blue Shirts
description: CompositionRed, black and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar with a full front button placket, full arm cuff sleeves with mid-sleeve buttoned flap, buttoned flap pockets on either chest, embroidered branding on back chest, stitch detailing and has a curved hemlineFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryFlaunt your style with this checked shirt from wrangler – the brand that has been clothing the world since 1947. The full arm sleeves allow you to roll them up for a casual feel, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
